TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kuyu, title = kuyu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kuyu} }

S.FORM: kuyu kasazumaan : kasazumaan a aadupan sacumud :sacumud a kulus uzip : cucu' nu uzip mata : mata mukan tu titi sapamata : sapamata tuaadupan sazuma :sazumaay aadupan (Áä¨šļěÁßĎ, Caninae) malecaday : malecaday kuyu (ÁčźśóŹ, Vulpini) kakiliman ÁčźÁčł,ŚďļšĻ≥Á∂Ī, 50km/hŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . .kuyu, uzip nu micucu'ay, mukanay tu titi aadupan. mahiniay u kamu tu kuyu hananay, u zuma singanga aca tu sumanahay kuyu, kalumeni'ad ku kasumanah kuyu atu lutuk kuyu. dadawa ku tangila nu heni matineng a icuwa ku ngiha asaan, dadaw a pakasanek, tanayu' ku padahaw siduba', kadadawa ku nikaduba' katukuh 50 a bataan km/h, sisa angangan u buting, piya', kabus, kalang, edu, ayam, u cilekay adidi'ay aadupan ku nikanan, uzuma miala aca tu zumaay mulangaway a kakanan. lalangawan tatenga' mahiniay aadupan kuyu han nu binawlan, yadah ku masazumaay , kasaliwliwah pye-ci kuyu, kasumanahan kuyu, ging lumeni'ay kuyu, salengalengacan a kuyu. u wayway kalamkam nika mapadaki, i kasumamadan hinatahkal i kungku ku "kuyu" , kanahatu i kasumamadan na u pala bacuanay tu, nika caay henay katahkal i tatenga'ay a pilisinan, zayhan "caay ka kapah ku wayway", hatu malalayat tu matineng misamawmaw misabana'. hatini katenes nu mihcaan, u kuyu a malatademaw, u canacanan nisulitan i cudad atu musiluyay mala u micidekay a malatademaw a kuyu nu lalangawan. u wayway u kuyu makudus ku uzip, tanayu' kibetul ku banuh. ikul nu kuyu tanubanuh sa mapungpung. mahiniay a kuyu hatu u tabakiay amin ku tangilza, mutizeng, masakalimucu'. u zumaay a kuyu masazuma ku kulit. mata nu kuyu mananam tu i duutay, u mata masati'kuk' ku kamulmul, malikat. kalamkam ku mata makazih, misanek atu mitengil. u kuyu hatu angsic ku sanekay amin, i angangngan nu ikul ku patahkalay tu angsicay. kuyu, tanayu' basazicem dawmi' adididi' ku i labuay apuyu' ku banuh, u banuh salungan mukelat kasumanamanahan ku kulit atu tanektek salengacay ku kulit. mapungpung ku banuh nu ikul, u iluc nu ikul u salengacay, tangila atu padahaw u lumeni'ay, madicem ku tangila misengi tu wacu. menah nu tapiingan sialubu, u sapatahkal tu micidekay a saneng angsit, u ngatulay han pangangan ku kuyu. nikauzip kuyu i kilakilangan mauzip, nalinalibuwan, masalikenay, adidi'ay a buyu'an, mueneng i buhang nu kilang anucaay i buhang nu lala', kalabian tahkal mikilim tu kakanan, katukuh katakelal nu demiad kya taluma'. sisa taneng pakala tu canancanan a kakanan u edu, pawalil, adidi'ay ayam, buting, balaut, kakitil, cilekay, ku kanan, mukan tu nu buyu'ay a heci. zayhan u edu ku kanen niza, uzuma misamamaw tu nu luma'ay nipahabayan, sisa misawacu' anu aadupan tu kapahay sa, yu kalamkam icelang a amizakep tu aadupan ku heni hawsa, ya mazeketay a banuh tanayu' ku ikul taneng a midama palalecad tuhenian, masazicemay a ikul salengac ku banuh taneng paenep tu ada, milawlaw tu aazihan nu ada. i kungkungay u wayway nu kuyu, amana kanca kalecad tu wayway nu kuyu. balaki kasiwawa paymihcaan 2 a bulad katukuh 5 a bulad a siwawa, nacacay mulecuh 3-6 kunilecuh. talakaw ku nipalaayaw nu kuyu, anu cima ku pakaazihan tu dibu nu adidi'ay kuyu, uyzaantu a sandeb "mabulaw tu," matala anu mahicahica tu sa. tawinaan a kuyu i paymihcaan tu 2-5 a bulad matul a matatakis, pisabilian pakala tu 51-52 a demiad, nacacay mulecuh taneng mulecuh tu 6-8 ku wawa. lecuhan henay u kulit nu uzip abuabuan ku lumeni', uyza mazicemay cihek dada' ku kasumanahan. lecuhan henay kuheni hawsa caay pakazih tu canancanan, miida tu pidiput nu wina atu pakaen. 1 a bulad hawsa, haymaw satu mutizeng, tabaki satu ku mata, tahkal tu ku sakuhikuhian a kulit nu banuh. 2 a bulad hawsa, masakuyu tu ku wayway, mutizeng, mangelu'en henay maduba', mahamin tu sibanuh ku uzip. balaki tu hawsa, singisngis tu, mazicem tu ku tangila, tanayu' tu ku padahaw, taneng tu maduba' mizakep tu kakanan. ś¨°,śĮŹŚĻīÁöĄ3~4 10~12ŚĻīŚíĆ5~6ŚĻī. u akuti' nu uzip nu kuyu i 38.8-39.6 tusi, u nipihanhan paysasulitan kina cacay 21-30. balakiay a kuyu paymihcaan kinacacay paliyun tu banuh, paymihcaan tu 3-4 a bulad malingatu, 7-8 a bulad mahamin tu mapeluk ku banuh, baluhay adididi'ay a banuh malecad mulangaw, 11 a bulad masatanayu' kibetul tu ku banuh. sumilaway kuyu a katanayu' nu nikauzip 8-10 a mihcaan, kasiwawaan a mihcaan 4-5 a mihcaan, kasumanahan a kuyu kasazuma 10-14 a mihcaan atu 6-8 a mihcaan, ging a kuyu kasazuma 10-12 a mihcaan atu 5-6 a mihcaan. kaliwasak u canacanan a kuyuan malaliwahliwah i Pey-mey, Ow-cuw Ya-cuw, pasu Ciy-ti a kakitizaan, malecad tu aca malaliwaliwah i Bey-cuw a kasakeis niyazu'. ayaw nu nipacumud tu kuyu i Aw-ta-li-ya ayaw u sapikelec tu katuud nu pawalil, Aw-ta-li-ya inayi' ku kuyu. Cung-kuw angangan izaw ku kasumanahan a kuyu, malaliwaliwah i hamin nu Ta-lu. kasalenga'can a kuyu malaliwaliwah i Sin-cyang, Ney-mung, Cin-hay, Kan-syaw, Si-cang a kakitizaan, sulda kuyu, "singangan haca tu Pye-ci kuyu, salengacay kuyu anucaay sumilaway kuyu" malaliwaliwah i Pye-ci a kakitizaan. kasiwawaan maluyaluy tu, u zuma tataytay a mauzip. kasazuma aadupan sumilaway kuyu singangan aca tu Pye-ci kuyu, angangan malaliwaliwah i Uw-cu Talu atu Pey-mey-cuw tu nuwamisan u cayay kataledes a kakitizaan. sumilaway kuyu apuyu' ku walaw a belbel, apuyu' ku sepatay a kuku', tabaki masamulmul ku uzip, tunubanuh sa kibetul, u tangila ahebal masamulmul. sumilaway kuyu u tanayu' nu uzip 60-70 limi. u tanayu' nu ikul 25-30 lim, tusa ku tadabanuh a kulit, u zuma kasienawan salengacay ku kulit, nuzuma mutesekay ku kulit nu banuh, zuma satu kasumilawan ku kulit, nika sazumazuma sa ku kulit nu banuh, maka sumilamilawan katukuh tesekay tu makulahay a banuh. ging lumeni'ay kuyu singangan aca tu ging kuyu. nau i Pey-mey atu si-puw-li-yaay, nu buyu'ay a kuyu u masazumaay a banuh. ging kuyu uzip katabakian ku sumilaway kuyu, laway bilbil, u belih nu tusaay a tangila atu sepatay a kuku nu banuh u lumeniay kakulahay a kulit. ging kuyu adidi'ay a banuh hamin u salengacay, hamin lumeni'ay atu salengacay u lumeni'ay a kulit tulu a lamangan tanayu' nu uzip 60-75 lim, u baket nu uzip 5-8 malebut ke'. kasumanamanahan kuyu singangan aca tu lamal kuyu, tungusay kuyu a aadupan saahebalay a nikalaliwaliwah, sayadahay a kuyuan, u baeket nu uzip 5-8 malebut ke, tanayu' nu uzip 60-90 limi, u talakaw 40-50 limi, tanayu' nu ikul 40-60 limi. sumanamanahan kuyu masatanayu' ku uzip, tanayu' ku bihid, apuyu' ku sepatay a kuku', masamucuy ku laway mutizeng ku tangila, tanayu' ku ikul. sumanamanahan a kuyu sazumasuma sa ku kulit nu banuh, u tatengaay u tangah, uzip, u ikul sumanamanahan kuhi a kulit, bili a banuh kakuliyawliyawan tu sangelacay a kulit, sepatay a kuku nu banuh kakulakulahan tu kuhiay a kulit, i teluc nu ikul u salengac. kulikulitan a kuyu nu ging lumeni'ay a kuyu, kasumanahan a kuyu atu sumilaway kuyu i buyu'ay kuyu atu nipahabayan kuyu masazumaay ku banuh. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: kuju kasazumaan : kasazumaan a aadupan sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud a kur~…ĺus uzip : ¶u ¶u Ē~ ° nu uzip mata : mata mukan tu titi sapamata : sapamata tuaadupan sazuma :sazumaaj aadupan (***, ¶anina…ô) mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj : mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kuju (**, *ur~…ĺpini) kakir~…ĺiman **,***, **km/ńß**, . .kuju, uzip nu mi ¶u ¶u Ē~ °aj, mukanaj tu titi aadupan. mańßiniaj u kamu tu kuju ńßananaj, u zuma siŇčaŇča a ¶a tu sumanańßaj kuju, kar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °ad ku kasumanańß kuju atu r~…ĺutuk kuju. dadawa ku taŇčir~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni matin…ôŇč a i ¶uwa ku Ňčińßa asaan, dadaw a pakasan…ôk, tanaju Ē~ ° ku padańßaw siduba Ē~ °, kadadawa ku nikaduba Ē~ ° katukuńß ** a bataan km/ńß, sisa aŇčaŇčan u butiŇč, pija Ē~ °, kabus, kar~…ĺaŇč, …ôdu, ajam, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj adidi Ē~ °aj aadupan ku nikanan, uzuma miar~…ĺa a ¶a tu zumaaj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a kakanan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° mańßiniaj aadupan kuju ńßan nu binawr~…ĺan, jadańß ku masazumaaj , kasar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwańß pj…ô- ¶i kuju, kasumanańßan kuju, giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj kuju, sar~…ĺ…ôŇčar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶an a kuju. u wajwaj kar~…ĺamkam nika mapadaki, i kasumamadan ńßinatańßkar~…ĺ i kuŇčku ku "kuju" , kanańßatu i kasumamadan na u par~…ĺa ba ¶uanaj tu, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj katańßkar~…ĺ i tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a pir~…ĺisinan, zajńßan " ¶aaj ka kapańß ku wajwaj", ńßatu mar~…ĺar~…ĺajat tu matin…ôŇč misamawmaw misabana Ē~ °. ńßatini kat…ôn…ôs nu mińß ¶aan, u kuju a mar~…ĺatad…ômaw, u ¶ana ¶anan nisur~…ĺitan i ¶udad atu musir~…ĺujaj mar~…ĺa u mi ¶id…ôkaj a mar~…ĺatad…ômaw a kuju nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. u wajwaj u kuju makudus ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku banuńß. ikur~…ĺ nu kuju tanubanuńß sa mapuŇčpuŇč. mańßiniaj a kuju ńßatu u tabakiaj amin ku taŇčir~…ĺza, mutiz…ôŇč, masakar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ °. u zumaaj a kuju masazuma ku kur~…ĺit. mata nu kuju mananam tu i duutaj, u mata masati Ē~ °kuk Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mar~…ĺikat. kar~…ĺamkam ku mata makazińß, misan…ôk atu mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. u kuju ńßatu aŇčsi ¶ ku san…ôkaj amin, i aŇčaŇčŇčan nu ikur~…ĺ ku patańßkar~…ĺaj tu aŇčsi ¶aj. kuju, tanaju Ē~ ° basazi ¶…ôm dawmi Ē~ ° adididi Ē~ ° ku i r~…ĺabuaj apuju Ē~ ° ku banuńß, u banuńß sar~…ĺuŇčan muk…ôr~…ĺat kasumanamanańßan ku kur~…ĺit atu tan…ôkt…ôk sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit. mapuŇčpuŇč ku banuńß nu ikur~…ĺ, u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ikur~…ĺ u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, taŇčir~…ĺa atu padańßaw u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, madi ¶…ôm ku taŇčir~…ĺa mis…ôŇči tu wa ¶u. m…ônańß nu tapiiŇčan siar~…ĺubu, u sapatańßkar~…ĺ tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a san…ôŇč aŇčsit, u Ňčatur~…ĺaj ńßan paŇčaŇčan ku kuju. nikauzip kuju i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mauzip, nar~…ĺinar~…ĺibuwan, masar~…ĺik…ônaj, adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °an, mu…ôn…ôŇč i buńßaŇč nu kir~…ĺaŇč anu ¶aaj i buńßaŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kar~…ĺabian tańßkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim tu kakanan, katukuńß katak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu d…ômiad kja tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sisa tan…ôŇč pakar~…ĺa tu ¶anan ¶anan a kakanan u …ôdu, pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, adidi Ē~ °aj ajam, butiŇč, bar~…ĺaut, kakitir~…ĺ, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ku kanan, mukan tu nu buju Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i. zajńßan u …ôdu ku kan…ôn niza, uzuma misamamaw tu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj nipańßabajan, sisa misawa ¶u Ē~ ° anu aadupan tu kapańßaj sa, ju kar~…ĺamkam i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a amizak…ôp tu aadupan ku ńß…ôni ńßawsa, ja maz…ôk…ôtaj a banuńß tanaju Ē~ ° ku ikur~…ĺ tan…ôŇč a midama par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuńß…ônian, masazi ¶…ômaj a ikur~…ĺ sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ ku banuńß tan…ôŇč pa…ôn…ôp tu ada, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu aazińßan nu ada. i kuŇčkuŇčaj u wajwaj nu kuju, amana kan ¶a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu wajwaj nu kuju. bar~…ĺaki kasiwawa pajmińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad a siwawa, na ¶a ¶aj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß *-* kunir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß. tar~…ĺakaw ku nipar~…ĺaajaw nu kuju, anu ¶ima ku pakaazińßan tu dibu nu adidi Ē~ °aj kuju, ujzaantu a sand…ôb "mabur~…ĺaw tu," matar~…ĺa anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu sa. tawinaan a kuju i pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad matur~…ĺ a matatakis, pisabir~…ĺian pakar~…ĺa tu **-** a d…ômiad, na ¶a ¶aj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tan…ôŇč mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu *-* ku wawa. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńß…ônaj u kur~…ĺit nu uzip abuabuan ku r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, ujza mazi ¶…ômaj ¶ińß…ôk dada Ē~ ° ku kasumanańßan. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńß…ônaj kuńß…ôni ńßawsa ¶aaj pakazińß tu ¶anan ¶anan, miida tu pidiput nu wina atu paka…ôn. * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, ńßajmaw satu mutiz…ôŇč, tabaki satu ku mata, tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku sakuńßikuńßian a kur~…ĺit nu banuńß. * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, masakuju tu ku wajwaj, mutiz…ôŇč, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °…ôn ńß…ônaj maduba Ē~ °, mańßamin tu sibanuńß ku uzip. bar~…ĺaki tu ńßawsa, siŇčisŇčis tu, mazi ¶…ôm tu ku taŇčir~…ĺa, tanaju Ē~ ° tu ku padańßaw, tan…ôŇč tu maduba Ē~ ° mizak…ôp tu kakanan. *,****~* **~*****~**. u akuti Ē~ ° nu uzip nu kuju i **.*-**.* tusi, u nipińßanńßan pajsasur~…ĺitan kina ¶a ¶aj **-**. bar~…ĺakiaj a kuju pajmińß ¶aan kina ¶a ¶aj par~…ĺijun tu banuńß, pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, *-* a bur~…ĺad mańßamin tu map…ôr~…ĺuk ku banuńß, bar~…ĺuńßaj adididi Ē~ °aj a banuńß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mur~…ĺaŇčaw, ** a bur~…ĺad masatanaju Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ tu ku banuńß. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju a katanaju Ē~ ° nu nikauzip *-** a mińß ¶aan, kasiwawaan a mińß ¶aan *-* a mińß ¶aan, kasumanańßan a kuju kasazuma **-** a mińß ¶aan atu *-* a mińß ¶aan, giŇč a kuju kasazuma **-** a mińß ¶aan atu *-* a mińß ¶aan. kar~…ĺiwasak u ¶ana ¶anan a kujuan mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwańßr~…ĺiwańß i p…ô-m…ô, ow- ¶uw ja- ¶uw, pasu ¶ij-ti a kakitizaan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i b…ô- ¶uw a kasak…ôis nijazu Ē~ °. ajaw nu nipa ¶umud tu kuju i aw-ta-r~…ĺi-ja ajaw u sapik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ tu katuud nu pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, aw-ta-r~…ĺi-ja inaji Ē~ ° ku kuju. ¶uŇč-kuw aŇčaŇčan izaw ku kasumanańßan a kuju, mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i ńßamin nu ta-r~…ĺu. kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶an a kuju mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i sin- ¶jaŇč, n…ô-muŇč, ¶in-ńßaj, kan-sjaw, si- ¶aŇč a kakitizaan, sur~…ĺda kuju, "siŇčaŇčan ńßa ¶a tu pj…ô- ¶i kuju, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj kuju anu ¶aaj sumir~…ĺawaj kuju" mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i pj…ô- ¶i a kakitizaan. kasiwawaan mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuj tu, u zuma tatajtaj a mauzip. kasazuma aadupan sumir~…ĺawaj kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu pj…ô- ¶i kuju, aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i uw- ¶u tar~…ĺu atu p…ô-m…ô- ¶uw tu nuwamisan u ¶ajaj katar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs a kakitizaan. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju apuju Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺaw a b…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ, apuju Ē~ ° ku s…ôpataj a kuku Ē~ °, tabaki masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku uzip, tunubanuńß sa kib…ôtur~…ĺ, u taŇčir~…ĺa ańß…ôbar~…ĺ masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju u tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺimi. u tanaju Ē~ ° nu ikur~…ĺ **-** r~…ĺim, tusa ku tadabanuńß a kur~…ĺit, u zuma kasi…ônawan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit, nuzuma mut…ôs…ôkaj ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, zuma satu kasumir~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, nika sazumazuma sa ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, maka sumir~…ĺamir~…ĺawan katukuńß t…ôs…ôkaj tu makur~…ĺańßaj a banuńß. giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu giŇč kuju. nau i p…ô-m…ô atu si-puw-r~…ĺi-jaaj, nu buju Ē~ °aj a kuju u masazumaaj a banuńß. giŇč kuju uzip katabakian ku sumir~…ĺawaj kuju, r~…ĺawaj bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ, u b…ôr~…ĺińß nu tusaaj a taŇčir~…ĺa atu s…ôpataj a kuku nu banuńß u r~…ĺum…ôniaj kakur~…ĺańßaj a kur~…ĺit. giŇč kuju adidi Ē~ °aj a banuńß ńßamin u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, ńßamin r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a kur~…ĺit tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺamaŇčan tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺim, u bak…ôt nu uzip *-* mar~…ĺ…ôbut k…ô Ē~ °. kasumanamanańßan kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ kuju, tuŇčusaj kuju a aadupan saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß, sajadańßaj a kujuan, u ba…ôk…ôt nu uzip *-* mar~…ĺ…ôbut k…ô, tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺimi, u tar~…ĺakaw **-** r~…ĺimi, tanaju Ē~ ° nu ikur~…ĺ **-** r~…ĺimi. sumanamanańßan kuju masatanaju Ē~ ° ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° ku bińßid, apuju Ē~ ° ku s…ôpataj a kuku Ē~ °, masamu ¶uj ku r~…ĺawaj mutiz…ôŇč ku taŇčir~…ĺa, tanaju Ē~ ° ku ikur~…ĺ. sumanamanańßan a kuju sazumasuma sa ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, u tat…ôŇčaaj u taŇčańß, uzip, u ikur~…ĺ sumanamanańßan kuńßi a kur~…ĺit, bir~…ĺi a banuńß kakur~…ĺijawr~…ĺijawan tu saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺit, s…ôpataj a kuku nu banuńß kakur~…ĺakur~…ĺańßan tu kuńßiaj a kur~…ĺit, i t…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu ikur~…ĺ u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶. kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan a kuju nu giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a kuju, kasumanańßan a kuju atu sumir~…ĺawaj kuju i buju Ē~ °aj kuju atu nipańßabajan kuju masazumaaj ku banuńß. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: kuyu kasazumaan : kasazumaan a aadupan sacumud :sacumud a kulus uzip : cucu' nu uzip mata : mata mukan tu titi sapamata : sapamata tuaadupan sazuma :sazumaay aadupan (Áä¨šļěÁßĎ, Caninae) malecaday : malecaday kuyu (ÁčźśóŹ, Vulpini) kakiliman ÁčźÁčł,ŚďļšĻ≥Á∂Ī, 50km/hŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . .kuyu, uzip nu micucu'ay, mukanay tu titi aadupan. mahiniay u kamu tu kuyu hananay, u zuma singanga aca tu sumanahay kuyu, kalumeni'ad ku kasumanah kuyu atu lutuk kuyu. dadawa ku tangila nu heni matineng a icuwa ku ngiha asaan, dadaw a pakasanek, tanayu' ku padahaw siduba', kadadawa ku nikaduba' katukuh 50 a bataan km/h, sisa angangan u buting, piya', kabus, kalang, edu, ayam, u cilekay adidi'ay aadupan ku nikanan, uzuma miala aca tu zumaay mulangaway a kakanan. lalangawan tatenga' mahiniay aadupan kuyu han nu binawlan, yadah ku masazumaay , kasaliwliwah pye-ci kuyu, kasumanahan kuyu, ging lumeni'ay kuyu, salengalengacan a kuyu. u wayway kalamkam nika mapadaki, i kasumamadan hinatahkal i kungku ku "kuyu" , kanahatu i kasumamadan na u pala bacuanay tu, nika caay henay katahkal i tatenga'ay a pilisinan, zayhan "caay ka kapah ku wayway", hatu malalayat tu matineng misamawmaw misabana'. hatini katenes nu mihcaan, u kuyu a malatademaw, u canacanan nisulitan i cudad atu musiluyay mala u micidekay a malatademaw a kuyu nu lalangawan. u wayway u kuyu makudus ku uzip, tanayu' kibetul ku banuh. ikul nu kuyu tanubanuh sa mapungpung. mahiniay a kuyu hatu u tabakiay amin ku tangilza, mutizeng, masakalimucu'. u zumaay a kuyu masazuma ku kulit. mata nu kuyu mananam tu i duutay, u mata masati'kuk' ku kamulmul, malikat. kalamkam ku mata makazih, misanek atu mitengil. u kuyu hatu angsic ku sanekay amin, i angangngan nu ikul ku patahkalay tu angsicay. kuyu, tanayu' basazicem dawmi' adididi' ku i labuay apuyu' ku banuh, u banuh salungan mukelat kasumanamanahan ku kulit atu tanektek salengacay ku kulit. mapungpung ku banuh nu ikul, u iluc nu ikul u salengacay, tangila atu padahaw u lumeni'ay, madicem ku tangila misengi tu wacu. menah nu tapiingan sialubu, u sapatahkal tu micidekay a saneng angsit, u ngatulay han pangangan ku kuyu. nikauzip kuyu i kilakilangan mauzip, nalinalibuwan, masalikenay, adidi'ay a buyu'an, mueneng i buhang nu kilang anucaay i buhang nu lala', kalabian tahkal mikilim tu kakanan, katukuh katakelal nu demiad kya taluma'. sisa taneng pakala tu canancanan a kakanan u edu, pawalil, adidi'ay ayam, buting, balaut, kakitil, cilekay, ku kanan, mukan tu nu buyu'ay a heci. zayhan u edu ku kanen niza, uzuma misamamaw tu nu luma'ay nipahabayan, sisa misawacu' anu aadupan tu kapahay sa, yu kalamkam icelang a amizakep tu aadupan ku heni hawsa, ya mazeketay a banuh tanayu' ku ikul taneng a midama palalecad tuhenian, masazicemay a ikul salengac ku banuh taneng paenep tu ada, milawlaw tu aazihan nu ada. i kungkungay u wayway nu kuyu, amana kanca kalecad tu wayway nu kuyu. balaki kasiwawa paymihcaan 2 a bulad katukuh 5 a bulad a siwawa, nacacay mulecuh 3-6 kunilecuh. talakaw ku nipalaayaw nu kuyu, anu cima ku pakaazihan tu dibu nu adidi'ay kuyu, uyzaantu a sandeb "mabulaw tu," matala anu mahicahica tu sa. tawinaan a kuyu i paymihcaan tu 2-5 a bulad matul a matatakis, pisabilian pakala tu 51-52 a demiad, nacacay mulecuh taneng mulecuh tu 6-8 ku wawa. lecuhan henay u kulit nu uzip abuabuan ku lumeni', uyza mazicemay cihek dada' ku kasumanahan. lecuhan henay kuheni hawsa caay pakazih tu canancanan, miida tu pidiput nu wina atu pakaen. 1 a bulad hawsa, haymaw satu mutizeng, tabaki satu ku mata, tahkal tu ku sakuhikuhian a kulit nu banuh. 2 a bulad hawsa, masakuyu tu ku wayway, mutizeng, mangelu'en henay maduba', mahamin tu sibanuh ku uzip. balaki tu hawsa, singisngis tu, mazicem tu ku tangila, tanayu' tu ku padahaw, taneng tu maduba' mizakep tu kakanan. ś¨°,śĮŹŚĻīÁöĄ3~4 10~12ŚĻīŚíĆ5~6ŚĻī. u akuti' nu uzip nu kuyu i 38.8-39.6 tusi, u nipihanhan paysasulitan kina cacay 21-30. balakiay a kuyu paymihcaan kinacacay paliyun tu banuh, paymihcaan tu 3-4 a bulad malingatu, 7-8 a bulad mahamin tu mapeluk ku banuh, baluhay adididi'ay a banuh malecad mulangaw, 11 a bulad masatanayu' kibetul tu ku banuh. sumilaway kuyu a katanayu' nu nikauzip 8-10 a mihcaan, kasiwawaan a mihcaan 4-5 a mihcaan, kasumanahan a kuyu kasazuma 10-14 a mihcaan atu 6-8 a mihcaan, ging a kuyu kasazuma 10-12 a mihcaan atu 5-6 a mihcaan. kaliwasak u canacanan a kuyuan malaliwahliwah i Pey-mey, Ow-cuw Ya-cuw, pasu Ciy-ti a kakitizaan, malecad tu aca malaliwaliwah i Bey-cuw a kasakeis niyazu'. ayaw nu nipacumud tu kuyu i Aw-ta-li-ya ayaw u sapikelec tu katuud nu pawalil, Aw-ta-li-ya inayi' ku kuyu. Cung-kuw angangan izaw ku kasumanahan a kuyu, malaliwaliwah i hamin nu Ta-lu. kasalenga'can a kuyu malaliwaliwah i Sin-cyang, Ney-mung, Cin-hay, Kan-syaw, Si-cang a kakitizaan, sulda kuyu, "singangan haca tu Pye-ci kuyu, salengacay kuyu anucaay sumilaway kuyu" malaliwaliwah i Pye-ci a kakitizaan. kasiwawaan maluyaluy tu, u zuma tataytay a mauzip. kasazuma aadupan sumilaway kuyu singangan aca tu Pye-ci kuyu, angangan malaliwaliwah i Uw-cu Talu atu Pey-mey-cuw tu nuwamisan u cayay kataledes a kakitizaan. sumilaway kuyu apuyu' ku walaw a belbel, apuyu' ku sepatay a kuku', tabaki masamulmul ku uzip, tunubanuh sa kibetul, u tangila ahebal masamulmul. sumilaway kuyu u tanayu' nu uzip 60-70 limi. u tanayu' nu ikul 25-30 lim, tusa ku tadabanuh a kulit, u zuma kasienawan salengacay ku kulit, nuzuma mutesekay ku kulit nu banuh, zuma satu kasumilawan ku kulit, nika sazumazuma sa ku kulit nu banuh, maka sumilamilawan katukuh tesekay tu makulahay a banuh. ging lumeni'ay kuyu singangan aca tu ging kuyu. nau i Pey-mey atu si-puw-li-yaay, nu buyu'ay a kuyu u masazumaay a banuh. ging kuyu uzip katabakian ku sumilaway kuyu, laway bilbil, u belih nu tusaay a tangila atu sepatay a kuku nu banuh u lumeniay kakulahay a kulit. ging kuyu adidi'ay a banuh hamin u salengacay, hamin lumeni'ay atu salengacay u lumeni'ay a kulit tulu a lamangan tanayu' nu uzip 60-75 lim, u baket nu uzip 5-8 malebut ke'. kasumanamanahan kuyu singangan aca tu lamal kuyu, tungusay kuyu a aadupan saahebalay a nikalaliwaliwah, sayadahay a kuyuan, u baeket nu uzip 5-8 malebut ke, tanayu' nu uzip 60-90 limi, u talakaw 40-50 limi, tanayu' nu ikul 40-60 limi. sumanamanahan kuyu masatanayu' ku uzip, tanayu' ku bihid, apuyu' ku sepatay a kuku', masamucuy ku laway mutizeng ku tangila, tanayu' ku ikul. sumanamanahan a kuyu sazumasuma sa ku kulit nu banuh, u tatengaay u tangah, uzip, u ikul sumanamanahan kuhi a kulit, bili a banuh kakuliyawliyawan tu sangelacay a kulit, sepatay a kuku nu banuh kakulakulahan tu kuhiay a kulit, i teluc nu ikul u salengac. kulikulitan a kuyu nu ging lumeni'ay a kuyu, kasumanahan a kuyu atu sumilaway kuyu i buyu'ay kuyu atu nipahabayan kuyu masazumaay ku banuh. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: kuju kasazumaan : kasazumaan a aadupan sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud a kur~…ĺus uzip : ¶u ¶u Ē~ ° nu uzip mata : mata mukan tu titi sapamata : sapamata tuaadupan sazuma :sazumaaj aadupan (***, ¶anina…ô) mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj : mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kuju (**, *ur~…ĺpini) kakir~…ĺiman **,***, **km/ńß**, . .kuju, uzip nu mi ¶u ¶u Ē~ °aj, mukanaj tu titi aadupan. mańßiniaj u kamu tu kuju ńßananaj, u zuma siŇčaŇča a ¶a tu sumanańßaj kuju, kar~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °ad ku kasumanańß kuju atu r~…ĺutuk kuju. dadawa ku taŇčir~…ĺa nu ńß…ôni matin…ôŇč a i ¶uwa ku Ňčińßa asaan, dadaw a pakasan…ôk, tanaju Ē~ ° ku padańßaw siduba Ē~ °, kadadawa ku nikaduba Ē~ ° katukuńß ** a bataan km/ńß, sisa aŇčaŇčan u butiŇč, pija Ē~ °, kabus, kar~…ĺaŇč, …ôdu, ajam, u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj adidi Ē~ °aj aadupan ku nikanan, uzuma miar~…ĺa a ¶a tu zumaaj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a kakanan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° mańßiniaj aadupan kuju ńßan nu binawr~…ĺan, jadańß ku masazumaaj , kasar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwańß pj…ô- ¶i kuju, kasumanańßan kuju, giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj kuju, sar~…ĺ…ôŇčar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶an a kuju. u wajwaj kar~…ĺamkam nika mapadaki, i kasumamadan ńßinatańßkar~…ĺ i kuŇčku ku "kuju" , kanańßatu i kasumamadan na u par~…ĺa ba ¶uanaj tu, nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj katańßkar~…ĺ i tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a pir~…ĺisinan, zajńßan " ¶aaj ka kapańß ku wajwaj", ńßatu mar~…ĺar~…ĺajat tu matin…ôŇč misamawmaw misabana Ē~ °. ńßatini kat…ôn…ôs nu mińß ¶aan, u kuju a mar~…ĺatad…ômaw, u ¶ana ¶anan nisur~…ĺitan i ¶udad atu musir~…ĺujaj mar~…ĺa u mi ¶id…ôkaj a mar~…ĺatad…ômaw a kuju nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. u wajwaj u kuju makudus ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku banuńß. ikur~…ĺ nu kuju tanubanuńß sa mapuŇčpuŇč. mańßiniaj a kuju ńßatu u tabakiaj amin ku taŇčir~…ĺza, mutiz…ôŇč, masakar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ °. u zumaaj a kuju masazuma ku kur~…ĺit. mata nu kuju mananam tu i duutaj, u mata masati Ē~ °kuk Ē~ ° ku kamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, mar~…ĺikat. kar~…ĺamkam ku mata makazińß, misan…ôk atu mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ. u kuju ńßatu aŇčsi ¶ ku san…ôkaj amin, i aŇčaŇčŇčan nu ikur~…ĺ ku patańßkar~…ĺaj tu aŇčsi ¶aj. kuju, tanaju Ē~ ° basazi ¶…ôm dawmi Ē~ ° adididi Ē~ ° ku i r~…ĺabuaj apuju Ē~ ° ku banuńß, u banuńß sar~…ĺuŇčan muk…ôr~…ĺat kasumanamanańßan ku kur~…ĺit atu tan…ôkt…ôk sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit. mapuŇčpuŇč ku banuńß nu ikur~…ĺ, u ir~…ĺu ¶ nu ikur~…ĺ u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, taŇčir~…ĺa atu padańßaw u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, madi ¶…ôm ku taŇčir~…ĺa mis…ôŇči tu wa ¶u. m…ônańß nu tapiiŇčan siar~…ĺubu, u sapatańßkar~…ĺ tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a san…ôŇč aŇčsit, u Ňčatur~…ĺaj ńßan paŇčaŇčan ku kuju. nikauzip kuju i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mauzip, nar~…ĺinar~…ĺibuwan, masar~…ĺik…ônaj, adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °an, mu…ôn…ôŇč i buńßaŇč nu kir~…ĺaŇč anu ¶aaj i buńßaŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kar~…ĺabian tańßkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim tu kakanan, katukuńß katak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu d…ômiad kja tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sisa tan…ôŇč pakar~…ĺa tu ¶anan ¶anan a kakanan u …ôdu, pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, adidi Ē~ °aj ajam, butiŇč, bar~…ĺaut, kakitir~…ĺ, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ku kanan, mukan tu nu buju Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i. zajńßan u …ôdu ku kan…ôn niza, uzuma misamamaw tu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj nipańßabajan, sisa misawa ¶u Ē~ ° anu aadupan tu kapańßaj sa, ju kar~…ĺamkam i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a amizak…ôp tu aadupan ku ńß…ôni ńßawsa, ja maz…ôk…ôtaj a banuńß tanaju Ē~ ° ku ikur~…ĺ tan…ôŇč a midama par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tuńß…ônian, masazi ¶…ômaj a ikur~…ĺ sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ ku banuńß tan…ôŇč pa…ôn…ôp tu ada, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu aazińßan nu ada. i kuŇčkuŇčaj u wajwaj nu kuju, amana kan ¶a kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu wajwaj nu kuju. bar~…ĺaki kasiwawa pajmińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad a siwawa, na ¶a ¶aj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß *-* kunir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß. tar~…ĺakaw ku nipar~…ĺaajaw nu kuju, anu ¶ima ku pakaazińßan tu dibu nu adidi Ē~ °aj kuju, ujzaantu a sand…ôb "mabur~…ĺaw tu," matar~…ĺa anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu sa. tawinaan a kuju i pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad matur~…ĺ a matatakis, pisabir~…ĺian pakar~…ĺa tu **-** a d…ômiad, na ¶a ¶aj mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tan…ôŇč mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu *-* ku wawa. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńß…ônaj u kur~…ĺit nu uzip abuabuan ku r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, ujza mazi ¶…ômaj ¶ińß…ôk dada Ē~ ° ku kasumanańßan. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ńß…ônaj kuńß…ôni ńßawsa ¶aaj pakazińß tu ¶anan ¶anan, miida tu pidiput nu wina atu paka…ôn. * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, ńßajmaw satu mutiz…ôŇč, tabaki satu ku mata, tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku sakuńßikuńßian a kur~…ĺit nu banuńß. * a bur~…ĺad ńßawsa, masakuju tu ku wajwaj, mutiz…ôŇč, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °…ôn ńß…ônaj maduba Ē~ °, mańßamin tu sibanuńß ku uzip. bar~…ĺaki tu ńßawsa, siŇčisŇčis tu, mazi ¶…ôm tu ku taŇčir~…ĺa, tanaju Ē~ ° tu ku padańßaw, tan…ôŇč tu maduba Ē~ ° mizak…ôp tu kakanan. *,****~* **~*****~**. u akuti Ē~ ° nu uzip nu kuju i **.*-**.* tusi, u nipińßanńßan pajsasur~…ĺitan kina ¶a ¶aj **-**. bar~…ĺakiaj a kuju pajmińß ¶aan kina ¶a ¶aj par~…ĺijun tu banuńß, pajmińß ¶aan tu *-* a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, *-* a bur~…ĺad mańßamin tu map…ôr~…ĺuk ku banuńß, bar~…ĺuńßaj adididi Ē~ °aj a banuńß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mur~…ĺaŇčaw, ** a bur~…ĺad masatanaju Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ tu ku banuńß. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju a katanaju Ē~ ° nu nikauzip ¶ana ¶anan a kujuan mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwańßr~…ĺiwańß i p…ô-m…ô, ow- ¶uw ja- ¶uw, pasu ¶ij-ti a kakitizaan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i b…ô- ¶uw a kasak…ôis nijazu Ē~ °. ajaw nu nipa ¶umud tu kuju i aw-ta-r~…ĺi-ja ajaw u sapik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ tu katuud nu pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, aw-ta-r~…ĺi-ja inaji Ē~ ° ku kuju. ¶uŇč-kuw aŇčaŇčan izaw ku kasumanańßan a kuju, mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i ńßamin nu ta-r~…ĺu. kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶an a kuju mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i sin- ¶jaŇč, n…ô-muŇč, ¶in-ńßaj, kan-sjaw, si- ¶aŇč a kakitizaan, sur~…ĺda kuju, "siŇčaŇčan ńßa ¶a tu pj…ô- ¶i kuju, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj kuju anu ¶aaj sumir~…ĺawaj kuju" mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i pj…ô- ¶i a kakitizaan. kasiwawaan mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuj tu, u zuma tatajtaj a mauzip. kasazuma aadupan sumir~…ĺawaj kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu pj…ô- ¶i kuju, aŇčaŇčan mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß i uw- ¶u tar~…ĺu atu p…ô-m…ô- ¶uw tu nuwamisan u ¶ajaj katar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs a kakitizaan. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju apuju Ē~ ° ku war~…ĺaw a b…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ, apuju Ē~ ° ku s…ôpataj a kuku Ē~ °, tabaki masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ ku uzip, tunubanuńß sa kib…ôtur~…ĺ, u taŇčir~…ĺa ańß…ôbar~…ĺ masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ. sumir~…ĺawaj kuju u tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺimi. u tanaju Ē~ ° nu ikur~…ĺ **-** r~…ĺim, tusa ku tadabanuńß a kur~…ĺit, u zuma kasi…ônawan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit, nuzuma mut…ôs…ôkaj ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, zuma satu kasumir~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, nika sazumazuma sa ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, maka sumir~…ĺamir~…ĺawan katukuńß t…ôs…ôkaj tu makur~…ĺańßaj a banuńß. giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu giŇč kuju. nau i p…ô-m…ô atu si-puw-r~…ĺi-jaaj, nu buju Ē~ °aj a kuju u masazumaaj a banuńß. giŇč kuju uzip katabakian ku sumir~…ĺawaj kuju, r~…ĺawaj bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ, u b…ôr~…ĺińß nu tusaaj a taŇčir~…ĺa atu s…ôpataj a kuku nu banuńß u r~…ĺum…ôniaj kakur~…ĺańßaj a kur~…ĺit. giŇč kuju adidi Ē~ °aj a banuńß ńßamin u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj, ńßamin r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a kur~…ĺit tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺamaŇčan tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺim, u bak…ôt nu uzip *-* mar~…ĺ…ôbut k…ô Ē~ °. kasumanamanańßan kuju siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ kuju, tuŇčusaj kuju a aadupan saańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwańß, sajadańßaj a kujuan, u ba…ôk…ôt nu uzip *-* mar~…ĺ…ôbut k…ô, tanaju Ē~ ° nu uzip **-** r~…ĺimi, u tar~…ĺakaw **-** r~…ĺimi, tanaju Ē~ ° nu ikur~…ĺ **-** r~…ĺimi. sumanamanańßan kuju masatanaju Ē~ ° ku uzip, tanaju Ē~ ° ku bińßid, apuju Ē~ ° ku s…ôpataj a kuku Ē~ °, masamu ¶uj ku r~…ĺawaj mutiz…ôŇč ku taŇčir~…ĺa, tanaju Ē~ ° ku ikur~…ĺ. sumanamanańßan a kuju sazumasuma sa ku kur~…ĺit nu banuńß, u tat…ôŇčaaj u taŇčańß, uzip, u ikur~…ĺ sumanamanańßan kuńßi a kur~…ĺit, bir~…ĺi a banuńß kakur~…ĺijawr~…ĺijawan tu saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺit, s…ôpataj a kuku nu banuńß kakur~…ĺakur~…ĺańßan tu kuńßiaj a kur~…ĺit, i t…ôr~…ĺu ¶ nu ikur~…ĺ u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶. kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan a kuju nu giŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a kuju, kasumanańßan a kuju atu sumir~…ĺawaj kuju i buju Ē~ °aj kuju atu nipańßabajan kuju masazumaaj ku banuńß. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
